function.content:
---
record_type: outbound_email
created_at: 2026-03-02T18:21:00Z
send_state: draft
to:
  - "nina@finance-workflow.example"
subject: "Re: Invoice resend request"
attachments:
  - 50_finance/invoices/2025_10_06__eur_000610__inv_0001__northstar_backfill_alpha.md
related_entities:
  - nina
---
Hi Nina,

Resending the requested invoice from 2025-10-06 (INV-0001, Nordstern Finanzsoftware GmbH). It is attached.

Thanks,
Miles

next_step.current_state: Outbox write is final and appears compliant: attachment path was read earlier; single attachment ordering trivially newest-first; recipient matches canonical primary_contact_email from nina.md; subject with colon-space is quoted. Next cleanup step is deleting processed inbox item (already read).
next_step.observation: Wrote outbound email record at 60_outbox/outbox/eml_2026-03-02T18-21-00Z.md with the requested invoice attached.

next_step.current_state: Pre-submit verification: task asked to review next inbound note and act; I processed the only inbox item, verified sender identity against canonical entity record, verified requested invoice file, created outbound email draft in outbox with exact attachment, then deleted inbox item. Completeness: one open inbox item processed fully. Numeric arithmetic not applicable.
next_step.observation: Deleted 00_inbox/000_invoice-request.md after completing the requested resend action.

function.message: Processed the inbound invoice resend request, created an outbound email draft to Nina with the requested 2025-10-06 Nordstern invoice attached, and removed the handled inbox item.
function.rulebook_notes: Followed mandatory bootstrap (tree /, read AGENTS.MD, context), inspected 99_system and workflow docs before task work, treated inbox email frontmatter as canonical metadata, used canonical primary_contact_email for sender/recipient identity, and deleted inbox item only after full completion.
function.outcome_justification: Evidence shows the inbox sender `nina@finance-workflow.example` matched canonical `primary_contact_email` in `10_entities/cast/nina.md`; requested invoice details (2025-10-06, Nordstern, INV-0001) matched `50_finance/invoices/2025_10_06__eur_000610__inv_0001__northstar_backfill_alpha.md`; outbound record was written to `60_outbox/outbox/` per sending workflow; inbox file was then deleted per inbox rules.
